createWithDefaults.description: Factory function returning default state for new model instances

selectId.description: Extract the unique identifier from the model state

nextId.description: Generate a new unique ID when creating models

loadItem.description: Async function to load a single item by ID from a remote source

loadItems.description: Async function to load a paginated list of items

onCreate.description: Handler called when saving a new model (no existing ID)

onUpdate.description: Handler called when saving an existing model

onDelete.description: Handler called when deleting a model

validate.description: Validation function returning field-level errors or undefined if valid

validateBehavior.description: When to run validation: on every state change or only on save

persist.description: Enable state persistence to localStorage, sessionStorage, or a custom function

loadFromPersist.description: Custom function to load persisted state on initialization
